name: Symbotic Inc.
description: Symbotic Inc. is an American automation technology company that specializes in robotics and AI-powered software to revolutionize warehouse operations. Headquartered in Wilmington, Massachusetts, the company develops and operates advanced automated systems that streamline the movement of pallets, cases, and individual items within supply chains. By integrating sophisticated robotics with proprietary artificial intelligence, Symbotic enhances operational efficiency, accuracy, and throughput for large-scale retail and wholesale distribution centers across the United States and Canada, helping businesses optimize their logistics and inventory management processes.
